snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3031 - Full Episode - 6th November 2020
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch full episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 3031: Jetha Must Wake Up Early
------------------------------------------------------------------
Jetha is passing time over WhatsApp and reading jokes when Bapuji and Tapu enter the room. Bapuji asks Jetha if he has decided to wake up late on the very first day. When Jetha tells him that he isn't sleepy yet, Bappuji tells him that no one will wake Jetha up the next morning. He must do it on his own.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: King - Picasso | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅♥️Follow🤴🏽On Instagram♥️✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking

LYRICS:

Hook

Tujhe sochne ki chhod,
Bina dekhe tasveer bana dun main,
Nigaahon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Tujhe dhoondhne ki chhod,
Jab chaahun tujhe chhoo ke bataadun main,
Fizaaon mein meri...
 Ho! - 2.T

Verse 1

Ajkal raja sambhle na tere sheher walon se,
Ajkal saare todh rakhe daant zeher walon ke,
Mujhe nasha nai pasand par sajde mehkhaano ke,
Maanu tumhe hi nasha ye tum batao kaise maanoge?

Khair!!

Ankhon mein tere surma hai jawaan,
It makes me hypnotise teri bahan ch main rawaan,
Pata nahi tu kaise ise legi but baby if you ready then just be my baby mama?!

Kudi kari jaan lina meri flex,
Munde kari jaan sign mera throw,
Mere beriyaan nu pata kal bright,
Tayiyon Raja inna kardeyaan glow.

Kehndi baby mennu pata hega,
Sara din gang gang mere aagge so sweet!
Duje phone wich Shooteraan de number saare scar face mennu laggan so freak.

Main ta bas teri khair mangdiyaan,
Tera naa leke taane kase sangdiyaan.

Rap

Jaana bachho mein tu rehna ab chhod de,
Ye saale darr jaate chhote chhote mod pe,
Maine aate hi le mahaaul banaya,
Jab maare kehke bande aur hit dono road pe.

Mera lifestyle thoda different
Karam peeche saare kaand hain front
Ek banda tode kitto ke ghamad
Baby if it's no risk maybe it's no fun.

Bas meri jaan tu hi jaan pe bani,
Mai jaha se bhi shuru kar lun khatam vahi,
Jaha pe teri yaadein aayi mere ghar na ho
Zehen mein meri par saari rahein..

Hook

Tujhe sochne ki chhod,
Bina dekhe tasveer bana dun main,
Nigaahon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Tujhe dhoondhne ki chhod,
Jab chaahun tujhe chhoo ke bataadun main,
Fizaaon mein meri...Tum Ho!

CREDITS:

Artist - King
Lyrics By King
Composed By King
Female Lead - Drutika Singh
Music Produced By Section 8
Previous Mix By Hrithik / Lax
Final Mix & Master By Rahul Sathu

Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te

Mere geet utte ne sharabi nachde
Khadki jande ne ni glass kach de
Khadke de vicho mennu saaj sunn de
Saaja' vicho' kann teri vaaj sunn de
Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

snippet.title: Watch Ramdas Athawale’s poetic farewell to Ghulam Nabi Azad in Rajya Sabha
snippet.description:
Rajya Sabha MP Ramdas Athawale gave a poetic farewell to Congress leader Ghulam Nabi Azad who retires from the upper house on 15th February 2021. Delivering a speech in his inimitable style, Athawale lauded Azad’s services and also made an offer to the senior Congress leader. Athawale said that if the Congress does not give Azad a Rajya Sabha ticket, the RPI would gladly do so. Watch this full video for all the details.

snippet.title: Roomies | Ep2/3: GIRLFRIEND | Mini Web Series | Gagan Arora, Nikhil Vijay, Badri & Anushka |Alright!
snippet.description:
Check out Roomies episode 2 and watch our roomies having girlfriend trouble.
Our partners in the show: 
Urban Gabru -  https://amzn.to/3jaBNVM
Royal Swag - https://youtu.be/qwlEsDg6ro8

Watch Roomies Ep 1 - https://youtu.be/6QoDVoKumMs
Watch Roomies official trailer: https://youtu.be/3P-qiwfTcFU

While sharing a living space has plenty of benefits, the sacrifices of living together are also not less. This crazy experience under one roof will definitely tell you that roomies can neither live without fighting nor they can live without each other. From the time they enter into our life till they become an integral part of our life, roomies can never stop troubling you. Are you ready to meet such mismatched personalities? #roomiesS1 #episode2

So if you also have a mismatched roomie then all you need to do is stay tuned till the end. Hit the like button, share with your friends, and subscribe to our channel, Alright for more such short funny videos: http://bit.ly/alrightsquad

#roommates #webseries

snippet.title: VK Sasikala pays tribute to late Tamil Nadu CM Jayalalithaa, returns to Chennai after 4 years
snippet.description:
#VKSasikala #TamilNadu
Expelled AIADMK leader V.K. Sasikala returned to poll-bound Tamil Nadu after 4 years Monday. Ahead of the journey to Chennai from Bengaluru, Sasikala and T.T.V. Dhinakaran offered floral tribute to late Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. Sasikala will meet her sister-in-law on 8 February in Chennai.

snippet.description:
Watch the report of Saas Bahu Aur Saazish to know the latest updates from the sets of the serial Kundali Bhagya. Have a look at how choas erupted in Kritika & Akshay's wedding. Stay connected for regular updates on top entertainment stories.

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Main Jis Din Bhulaa Du"; a brand new song in the voice of “Jubin Nautiyal" & "Tulsi Kumar" featuring Himansh Kohli & Sneha Namanandi. The lyrics of the new song are penned by Manoj Muntashir; music by Rochak Kohli. The video is directed by Navjit Buttar.

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

snippet.title: That Irritating Uncle | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Whatever gender you are, after reaching certain age, wherever we go we are bombarded with the same question, When are you getting married? When is your turn? etc.
After certain point of time it really gets on our nerve but we cannot express our anger or irritation towards them. So this video expresses those feelings for you all who are in that space. Enjoy.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unimited Team

snippet.title: 10 th Level Prelims Exam ന്റെ Hall ticket വന്നിട്ടുണ്ട്.💥.  ബാക്കി ഉള്ളവരുടെ Exam എപ്പോൾ??
snippet.description:
💥💥നിങ്ങൾക്ക് ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതൽ ഉപകാരപ്പെടുന്നത്  Exam oriented ആയിട്ടുള്ള ക്ലാസ്സുകൾ ആയിരിക്കും. ഇതുവരെ exam ന് ചോദിച്ച ചോദ്യങ്ങൾ മാത്രം ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തിയത്.. 

Part 1-- https://youtu.be/DK8UBR6iOMU

Part 2-- https://youtu.be/ucfNwpDi_6I

Part 3 --  https://youtu.be/jK8ViItc1yw

Part 4 -- https://youtu.be/9oa6Z-2zLNA

part 5-  https://youtu.be/YY7SeXSlSLw 

part 6-.https://youtu.be/gwMl_RqFKrg

part 7 -  https://youtu.be/M5XAlwgkLTA

😊 നമ്മുടെ channel ന്റെ PLAYLIST check ചെയ്ത് നോക്കുക. ഓരോ topic um seperate playlist ആക്കി വെച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.. കണ്ടുനോക്കു. നിങ്ങൾക്ക് വേണ്ട എല്ലാം അവിടെ കാണും  😊

📢  Mr & Mrs psc offical എന്നാണ് നമ്മുടെ Telegram channel ന്റെ പേര്.. Mr and Mrs psc എന്നാണ് നമ്മുടെ Telegram group ന്റെ  പേര്.. channel ലും ഗ്രൂപ്പ്‌ ലും join ചെയ്യുക.. മുകളിൽ പറഞ്ഞ പേര് Telegram ൽ search ചെയ്യുക..

ഞങ്ങളുടെ ചാനൽ ഇനിയും നിങ്ങൾ Subscribe ചെയ്‌തിട്ടില്ലായെങ്കിൽ Subscribe ചെയ്യുക...

#MrandMrspsc  #Admitcard  #PscExam


 #Hallticket

snippet.title: Recipe 392: Thai Amavasai Lunch Combo
snippet.description:
#Milk Kesari

Milk - 4 tumbler
Saffron - 10 strings
Ghee - 6 spoon
Cashew nuts - 15 to 20
Dry Grapes - 10 to 15 (Optional)
Rava - 1 cup
Pre boiled milk - 4 & 1/2 cup
Brown Sugar - 1 & 1/4 cup

#Raw_Banana_podimas

Grated raw banana - 1 cup
Oil - 3 spoon
Mustard - 1/4 spoon
white urad dal - 1 spoon
Asafoetida powder - 1/4 tsp
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Salt to taste
Ginger - 1 spoon (Chopped)
Green chilli - 1 (Chopped)
Curry leaves as required
Grated coconut - 2 spoon
Lime juice - 1/2 lemon

#Cluster_Bean_Kari

Cluster Bean - 1 cup (Chopped)
Water - 2 cup
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Salt to taste
Grated coconut as required
Oil - 2 spoon
Mustard - 1/4 spoon
Dry chilli - 4 
White urad dal - 1 spoon
Asafoetida powder - 1/4 tsp
Curry leaves as required

#Ash_Gourd_&_Pumpkin_Sambar

Ash Gourd & Pumpkin (Diced)
Tamarind water - 1 lemon size tamarind
Homemad sambar powder - 3 spoon
Salt to taste
Asafoetida powder - 1/2 tsp
Curry Leaves as required
Toor dal paste - 4 tbsp
Coriander leaves as required
Oil - 2 spoon
Mustard - 1/2 spoon
Fenugreek - 1/4 spoon
Dry chilli - 2
#Ginger_Lemon_Rasam
Water as required
Turmeric Powder - 1/2 tsp
Green Chilli - 1/2 (Chopped)
Ginger - 3/4 tsp (Chopped)
Sambar Powder - 1/4 tsp
Salt to taste
Asafoetida powder - 1/2 tsp
Curry Leaves as required
Big size Tomato - 1 (Chopped)
Toor dal water as required
Coriander leaves as required
Ghee - 1 spoon
Mustard - 1/4 tsp
Pepper cumin powder - 1/2 spoon
Lime juice - 1/2 lemon

Music Track Rights owned by Mrs. Yogambal Sundar, Original Music Composed by Ramprasad Sundar

Chef Yogambal Sundar's social media links : 

Subscribe to Chef Yogambal Sundar's YouTube Channel : youtube.com/c/Yogambal​ Sundar

Like Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/yogambalsundar​

Follow Chef Yogambal Sundar on Instagram.

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की  | Episode 61 & 62 | Recap
snippet.description:
After attending Manas and Juhi's school function, Purvi and Virendra have a discussion about the attack upon him. But the discussion comes to an abrupt end when Purvi claims to know the perpetrator behind the attack who is none other than Virendra's brother, Vaibhav! How will Virendra react to this shocking revelation?

#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KugwSJL_LP3-WDgtLMI4Z13

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

LYRICS

Ishq mein ratjage,
Hain hone ab lage,
Kare ye dil kya...
Tu hai mehram mera
Mein bas hun tera
To Mushkil kya...
Tujhko khud mein utaar lun
Jaise seene mein saansein...
Bin tere andar hi andar
Gadti hain mere faasein...

Tu, tu yaara mera dil
Tu yaara meri jaan
Tu har armaan...
Haan tu sang hain mere
Main Shukre Khuda
Main sajde kara...

Chandasa Mukhda tera,
Aise aankhon mein bhara
Jaise hothon pe dhara tera naam....
Bin tere na din uga
Na to raaton ka paata
Sari duniya mein sham hi sham...
Tere sang sang chali gayi..
Mere hasne ki baatein...
Meri aankhon ke niche ab
Aagayi Kaali raatein....

Tu, tu yaara mera dil
Tu yaara meri jaan
Tu har armaan...
Haan tu sang hain mere
Main Shukre Khuda
Main sajde kara

Channa Ve teri yaad sataye
Channa Ve mujhe chain na aaye
Channa Ve tu jo laut ke aaye
To dil mera shukar manaye
Aajave meri dhoopo ke saaye
Aajave mujhe meh jalaye
Aajave mujhe hizar mitaye
Mile to mujhe sab miljaye

Kannana Kanne is a family drama serial on Sun TV. Goutham, a rich businessman despises his daughter Meera as he holds her responsible for the loss of his beloved wife and immense wealth on the day she was born. Though Meera shares a special bond with her stepmother and stepsister, she grows up yearning for her father’s love and affection. Will destiny pave the way for Meera to win over her father’s heart.

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 08 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: டேய் ஒருத்தனுக்கு ஒரு வடை தாண்ட உன்னோட சைஸ்'கு ஏத்த மாறி எல்லாம் தர முடியாது | மாவு இல்லை ராசா |
snippet.description:
டேய் ஒருத்தனுக்கு ஒரு வடை தாண்ட உன்னோட சைஸ்'கு ஏத்த மாறி எல்லாம் தர முடியாது | மாவு இல்லை ராசா | 
#vadivelu_comedy

SUPPORT US ON FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/sirikkalamvaanga55


Kumaravadivel Natarajan, known professionally as Vadivelu, is an Indian film actor, comedian and playback singer. Since the 1990s, he has performed in supporting and lead roles as a comedy actor in Tamil films.

While having worked in more than 200 films, Vadivelu received awards in the Best Comedian category for his performances in Kaalam Maari Pochu (1996), Vetri Kodi Kattu (2000), Thavasi (2001), Chandramukhi (2005), Imsai Arasan 23m Pulikesi (2006), Marudhamalai (2007) and Kathavarayan (2008). His popularity led to his media-coined nickname, Vaigai Puyal, meaning "Vaigai storm",[3] referring to the river that flows through his hometown Madurai.

snippet.title: Modi Government को Harsimrat Kaur Badal ने Lok Sabha में Farm Laws पर घेरा? | Farmers Protest
snippet.description:
Former cabinet minister and Akali Dal’s leader Harsimrat Kaur Badal attacked the Modi government over the farmer’s issue in the Lok Sabha. She said that Prime Minister had to call them "parasites". She also accused the government of targeting journalists over their coverage of the farmers' protest in the national capital.  Lok Sabha members participated in the debate on Motion of Thanks to the President's address. President addressed the joint sitting of Parliament on January 29 at the beginning of the Budget Session. Watch the video to know more.

దక్షణ భారతదేశంలో అతిపెద్ద డాన్స్ రియాలిటీ షో "ఢీ".... 12 సీజన్స్ ముగించుకొని ఇప్పుడు  ఢీ కింగ్స్ v/s క్వీన్స్ ("ఢీ" 13వ సీజన్) గా మిమ్మల్ని అలరించడానికి వేరే లెవల్ ఎంటర్ టైన్ మెంట్ ని అందించడానికి సిద్దమైంది. కింగ్స్ టీమ్ కి సుడిగాలి సుధీర్ & హైపర్ ఆది, క్వీన్స్ టీమ్ కి రేష్మి & టిక్ టాక్ స్టార్ దీపికా... జడ్జెస్ గా శేఖర్ మాస్టర్ గారు హీరోయిన్ ప్రియమణి వ్యవహరిస్తారు.

snippet.title: Ram is irritating Jaanu | Desert safar Belly dance in dubai
snippet.description:
Hiiii all ❤ In this video, you guys will see alot of things happened in the desert of dubai.. Desert safari, belly dance, Fire show and what not! Oh i forgot about the camel ride!  Everything was fun.... We ate, danced, enjoyed alot and this has to be one of the best day in Dubai!!! We have also added alot of clips of the fire show and all so that you guys also can experience that!!  The fire Show was the best.. We have seen something like that before!! Much more videos are coming!!! stay with us and always keep an eye on our channel because we don't want you to miss the dubai fun vlogs!Make sure you subscribe to us and share our videos with your friends so that they can enjoy ❤😍

snippet.title: Tumhe Dekh Ke - Official Video | Salman Ali, Mateena | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha P | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love this Valentine's Day with ‘Tumhe Dekh Ke’, a quintessential romantic ballad by composers Salim - Sulaiman, with the video set in various parts of Kashmir. It’s a love story of a young couple in the valley, where the boy is expressing his feelings for the girl and how every moment they share takes him into a trance. The video features Salman Ali who has also lent his voice to the song.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Tumhe Dekh Ke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6NiyO5E6ALWR5LznZPlaJx?si=kUGaQcbsRQ6zhSRS6go6cQ

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/tumhe-dekh-ke-single/1551366524

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke-1

JioSaavn:https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/QSU5SAZ,WXI

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/or_196006028565_ING642100104

Hungama Music: https://www.hungama.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/61980788/

To Set "Tumhe Dekh Ke" Your Caller Tune: 
Vodafone Customers Dial 53712311217
Idea Customers Dial 5678912311217
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912311217

Audio Credits
Music Composed & Produced by : Salim - Sulaiman
Lyrics : Shradha Pandit
Singer : Salman Ali
Additional Music Production : Raj Pandit
Guitars : Ankur Mukherjee
Dholak : Aslam Dafrani, Navin Sharma
Tabla : Navin Sharma
Rabab : Irfan Nabi
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Recorded by : Aftab Khan & Raj Pandit at Blue Productions
Mixed & Mastered by : Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio
Distributed by Global Music Junction

Video Credits
Director/ D.O.P : Tassaduq Hussain Baba
Executive Producer : Radhika Mistry
DA : Bisma Farooq
AD : Rouf Fida
Editor : Abhishek Seth
Colour Grade : Black Acid Production
First AC : Arif Bashir Wani 
2nd AC : Rouf Fida
Production Head : Mehraj Bhat 
Production Assistant : Zeeshan Farooq 
Production Assistant : Zubair Hamid Khan 
Best Boy : Farzan Shakeel
Best Boy Grip : Nadeem Farooq 
Transport : Farooq Ahmad
Line Producer : Misba Ali

Cast: 
Featuring 
Mateena Rajput 
Father : Lone Bashir
Mother : Jameela Akther
Casting Director : Shaarika Pandit (ShaariCast)

Managed by : Nirav Thakar, Radhika Mistry
Digital Strategy : Shivansh Jindal
Album Creatives : Dishant Mistry
PR: Lily Ahluwalia

Lyrics:

Yun toh bahut haseen chehre dekhe hai
Kise se ishq ho jaana toh, khuda ki marzi hoti hai, khuda ki marzi hoti hai

Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai
Tumhe dekhke lagta hai
Jannat se barsi dua hai

Dil mein basa lo sanam
Ke bin tere jeena kya hai
Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai

Pooche duniya 
Kya hai yeh maajara 
dil ka yeh hashar kya kahein 

Chhupta hai kahaan 
yeh rang hai pyaar ka
Kiska hai asar kya kahein

Hum toh izhaar-e-mohabbat karenge
tu jo ishaara kare
Aakhir yeh zindagi tumhari hai
Tumhi se jahaan hai 

Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai
Tumhe dekhke lagta hai
Jannat se barsi dua hai

Dil mein basa lo sanam
Ke bin tere jeena kya hai
Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya

snippet.title: Indulekha - Ep 90 | 08 Feb 2021 | Surya TV | Malayalam Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the latest Episode of the New Malayalam Serial #Indulekha that airs on Surya TV.
 
 You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021

#Indulekha #SuryaTV #MalayalamSerial

Indulekha is a family drama serial on Surya TV. The story is about a girl, Indulekha who faces the untimely death of her father, loss of their vast wealth and forced out of their huge home, along with her mother and sister, all on her wedding day. snippet.description:
To find out more about Fluid Pitch visit https://www.pitchinnovations.com/
To know more about the MIDI Innovation Awards.

Visit https://musichackspace.org/mia2021
“Fluid pitch is an innovative next-generation MIDI Pitch bend system, which is not only free of existing limitations but a Revolutionary Leap Forward in Music expressions for all Musicians.

Experience Fluid pitch bending, Enjoy Polyphonic scale locked pitch bending, Access MPE synths, Micro tune individual notes and open new dimensions in creativity on stage and studio.


Credits:

Edited by Hashim Zain

snippet.title: 11फरवरी मौनीअमावस्या पर चुपचाप तिल डालकर करें रोटीका महाउपाय सभी कष्टों और दोषोंसे मुक्ति/अमावस्या
snippet.description:
#मौनीअमावस्या #चमत्कारीअचूकउपाय #पितृदोष
आपको हमारे चैनल पर हर तरह की जानकारी प्राप्त हो सकती है आप मनीषा त्रिपाठी टाइप करें और रेसिपी, या फिर कोई साबुन, हेयर आयल, नारियल की रेसिपी, हो या फिर किसी प्रकार का जूस पीते हैं तो उसकी भी जानकारी है।

अमावस्या तिथि पर करें यह अचूक उपाय आजमाया हुआ है यह सारे उपाय आपकी फूटी किस्मत बदलने की ताकत रखता है यह अचूक उपाय।
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTIHnljEiwXlAbzQsomado_uMi4wjGZgp
जीवन की सभी समस्याओं के समाधान के लिए करें अचूक उपाय.
https://youtu.be/sF_4bWmg_J8
बच्चों को शिष्टाचार सदाचार कैसे कब सिखाएं 
https://youtu.be/9tk-E9aa9pw
गाय की सेवा करने से भाग्य को बदला जा सकता है 
https://youtu.be/w1asUy2oycY
सोने से भी कीमती है यह बातें 
https://youtu.be/3MCjuUwXcS0
सरकारी नौकरी के लिए यदि परेशान है तो करें यह उपाय 
https://youtu.be/HGigCWt8wsc
tags: 11फरवरी 2021मौनी अमावस्या पर करें सरसों के तेल का उपाय
अमावश्यातिथी चुपचाप पुरानी झाडू से करें ये उपाय पितृदोष बदल जायेगा पितृ आशिर्वाद
अमावस्या पर करें यह अनोखा उपाय चमक जायेगी किस्मत घर मे खुशियों की होगी बरसात
mauniamavasya 2021 Amavasya February 2021 kab hai magh amavasya
अमावश्यातिथी पर करें भयंकर पितृदोष का उपाय
मौनी अमावश्यापर इनमें से कोई एक उपाय जरूर करें.

snippet.title: संसद में Akhilesh Yadav ने Farm Laws पर Modi सरकार को घेरा और चंदाजीवी बता दिया | Farmer protest
snippet.description:
तेरा तुझको अर्पण के लिए यहां क्लिक करें - https://rb.gy/e6w2nf

Samajwadi Party MP and Ex chief minister of Uttar Pradesh participated in Loksabha. He said in loksabha that The nation attained independence through agitation. Innumerable rights were received through agitation. Women received the right to vote through agitation. Mahatama Gandhi became the father of the nation because he agitated for Africa, the world & the nation.  He also said that yesterday I heard 'MSP tha, MSP hai, MSP rahega'. It's just in speech but not on ground. Farmers aren't getting it, had they been getting, they wouldn't have been sitting in Delhi. I congratulate agitating farmers that they have awakened farmers across India

साहित्य - ५/६ कच्ची केळी, १½ tblsp धणे पावडर, १½ tblsp लाल मिरची पावडर, १ tsp चाट मसाला, १ tsp हळद, १ tsp जिरा पावडर, ¼ tsp हिंग, १ कप बारीक रवा आणि चवीनुसार मीठ. 

कृती - प्रथम केळ्याचे काप तयार करून सर्व मसाले आणि मीठ  त्यावर चांगले चोळून घ्या. रव्यात सुद्धा चिमूटभर हळद, मीठ आणि लाल मिरची पावडर घालून एकजीव करून घ्या. तयार काप रव्यात घोळून गरम तेलात मध्यम आचेवर दोन्ही बाजूने ३/३ मिनिटे फ्राय करून घ्या.


#bananafry #tatasampann #crispybananafry

4) पाव भाजीचा मसाला | Pav bhaji Masala recipe - https://youtu.be/sNsV7JcgwuQ

5)  Pani Puri Masala | पाणीपुरीचा मसाला - https://youtu.be/umr1suhFgbA

6) Misal Masala | मिसळ मसाला - https://youtu.be/Vu4gIiB4iQE

7) Chaat Masala For Fast | उपवास चाट मसाला  -  https://youtu.be/Wrv53coZabI

8) Homemade Pure Ghee | शुद्ध साजूक तूप  -  https://youtu.be/XUFyFe1vGHQ

9) पाण्यावर थापलेली तांदळाची भाकरी | Rice Roti - https://youtu.be/h0JYGB1MIGg

snippet.title: Pre Teaser of Radhe Shyam | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Glimpse on February 14th
snippet.description:
Pre Teaser Of Radhe Shyam On UV Creations. Radhe Shyam is an upcoming Indian romantic drama film starring Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. The film is presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. Movie is Shot simultaneously in Telugu, Tamil and Hindi. Also starring Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others. Cinematography  Manoj Paramahamsa. Music Theme by Mithoon. Art Director Ravinder.

A Glimpse on February 14th. Save the Date.

#PreTeaserOfRadheShyam #Prabhas #PoojaHegde #RadhaKrishnaKumar #UVCreations #TSeries #Prabhas20 #RadheShyamTeaser #RadheShyamMotionPoster

snippet.title: F9 - The Big Game Spot
snippet.description:
F9
www.thefastsaga.com

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

snippet.title: Vallamai Tharayo | EP 78 | YouTube Exclusive | Digital Daily Series | 10-02-2021
snippet.description:
Co-presented by ITC Aashirvaad Superior MP Atta Vallamai Tharayo -https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list...
Buy Aashirvaad atta now like Abhirami to make easy to make recipes from Aashirvaad Atta’s Cookbook: http://bit.ly/aashirvaadcookbook
விகடன் டெலிவிஸ்டாஸ் மற்றும் மோஷன் கன்டென்ட் குரூப் நிறுவனங்கள் இணைந்து தயாரிக்கும் இந்தியாவின் முதல் யூடியூப் டெய்லி சீரிஸ் `வல்லமை தாராயோ’. திங்கள் முதல் வெள்ளிவரை இரவு 7.00 மணிக்கு யூடியூபில் (https://goo.gl/QiBz7h) மட்டும் ஒளிபரப்பாகத் தொடங்கியிருக்கும் இந்த சீரிஸ் ஒரு பெண்ணின் வாழ்க்கையையும், அவளின் உணர்வுகளையும் மையப் படுத்தியது. Presenting the latest episode of #VallamaiTharayo - India's 1st #DailyDigitalSeries on #YouTube from the house of Vikatan Televistas & Motion Content Group. #VikatanDigitalDaily #YouTubePremiumDaily 

Story & Screenplay by 'Kolangal' V. Thiruselvam, directed by Chidambaram Manivannan, starring Shali Nivekas, VJ Parvathy, Vivek Rajagopal, Kaushick, Saranya Ravichandran and R S Shivaji with a host of others, this series runs Monday to Friday, 7 PM only on YouTube. Subscribe to our channel to stay tuned.

Director  Chidambaram Manivannan
Story & Screenplay  ‘Kolangal’ V. Thiruselvam
Additional Screenplay Veki Amirtharaj
Cinematographer Sathya Venkataraman
Music Director K.C. Balasarangan
Editor Chandru.B
Art Director Vasu Dhevan
Sound Design K Dileep
Dialogues Paari Ayyasami
Additional Dialogues Rajkamal Bharathi
Lyricist Aravind Kumar
Colourist Karthick Chandrasekar
Designer Pradeep Raj
Subtitles  Dhi Subtitles

Vikatan and Motion Content Group, in association with YouTube, present a Digital Daily, exclusively on YouTube. Please show some love to 'Vallamai Tharayo' (trans. Give me the strength). Vikatan's first 'Digital Only' outing, a daily that shall not be on TV but only on YouTube.  This offering from Vikatan that shall join #VikatanPrimeTime in the company of Alaigal, Kolangal, Thirumathi Selvam, Thendral, Azhagi and the currently running show on SUN TV - Naayagi.
Around 22 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been more than 2 decades of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas#FromTheHouseOfVikatanAndMotionContentGroup #Vikatan #DigitalDailySeries

விகடன் டெலிவிஸ்டாஸ் மற்றும் மோஷன் கன்டென்ட் குரூப் நிறுவனங்கள் இணைந்து தயாரிக்கும் இந்தியாவின் முதல் யூடியூப் டெய்லி சீரிஸ் `வல்லமை தாராயோ’. திங்கள் முதல் வெள்ளிவரை இரவு 7.00 மணிக்கு யூடியூபில் (https://goo.gl/QiBz7h) மட்டும் ஒளிபரப்பாகத் தொடங்கியிருக்கும் இந்த சீரிஸ் ஒரு பெண்ணின் வாழ்க்கையையும், அவளின் உணர்வுகளையும் மையப் படுத்தியது. Presenting the latest episode of #VallamaiTharayo - India's 1st #DailyDigitalSeries on #YouTube from the house of Vikatan Televistas & Motion Content Group. #VikatanDigitalDaily #YouTubePremiumDaily 

Story & Screenplay by 'Kolangal' V. Thiruselvam, directed by Chidambaram Manivannan, starring Shali Nivekas, VJ Parvathy, Vivek Rajagopal, Kaushick, Saranya Ravichandran and R S Shivaji with a host of others, this series runs Monday to Friday, 7 PM only on YouTube. Subscribe to our channel to stay tuned.

Director  Chidambaram Manivannan
Story & Screenplay  ‘Kolangal’ V. Thiruselvam
Additional Screenplay Veki Amirtharaj
Cinematographer Sathya Venkataraman
Music Director K.C. Balasarangan
Editor Chandru.B
Art Director Vasu Dhevan
Sound Design K Dileep
Dialogues Paari Ayyasami
Additional Dialogues Rajkamal Bharathi
Lyricist Aravind Kumar
Colourist Karthick Chandrasekar
Designer Pradeep Raj
Subtitles  Dhi Subtitles

Vikatan and Motion Content Group, in association with YouTube, present a Digital Daily, exclusively on YouTube. Please show some love to 'Vallamai Tharayo' (trans. Give me the strength). Vikatan's first 'Digital Only' outing, a daily that shall not be on TV but only on YouTube.  This offering from Vikatan that shall join #VikatanPrimeTime in the company of Alaigal, Kolangal, Thirumathi Selvam, Thendral, Azhagi and the currently running show on SUN TV - Naayagi.
Around 22 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been more than 2 decades of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas#FromTheHouseOfVikatanAndMotionContentGroup #Vikatan #DigitalDailySeries

snippet.description:
